note: Hyperliquid isolated long AMBER, dYdX cross short GREEN with portfolio offset, empty

output_payload.mark_price_note: Liquidation is triggered at the mark price (not last-traded). On Hyperliquid, mark = median(spot, bid, ask). Divergence from entry can cause liquidation before the price you see on charts.
output_payload.disclaimer: Not financial advice. Liquidation parameters vary by venue, tier, and market conditions. Verify MMR tiers and mark-price rules with your venue before trading. For informational purposes only.

output_payload.portfolio_margin_note: Cross-margin: account-level liquidation when account_value < sum(notional_i * mmr_i). Leverage sets collateral drawn, not the liquidation trigger.
